text: I feel swept up in the momentum of complex questions, surrounded by groups engaged in discussion and debate. In the first space, quiet anticipation tinges the air as ideas circulate beneath the surface, waiting for critical examination. The second space exudes the energy of innovation and intellectual curiosity, where discourse and the display of research provoke thought. Being here, I am both challenged and invigorated, called to reflect deeply on the boundaries and possibilities of reason and danger within the theatre of new ideas. It is an arena of minds, teetering between uncertainty and inspiration.
